title: After the Queen Elizabeth II Cup: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I did it! I ran the full 2,200 meters! Wow! This
feels like a dream!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry! I don't mean to laugh. You just look so
worried about me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay. My heart feels so full it could burst, but
I can stand.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right now, I just want you to be happy for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I worked really hard! And I won!
choice_data_list: You did! I'm so proud of you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I owe it to you, Trainer! And all your hard work!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You thought of everything you could to help me
win today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I was able to perform better than
what I'm really capable of!
choice_data_list: No, that's just because you're amazing!
No, that's just because you're amazing!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's not true. You're the amazing one, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Listen to the two of them praising each other
nonstop. It's so adorable.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: U-um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Since we both worked so hard...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we just give each other a
congratulatory bouquet and call it even?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Um, like this!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Great work, Trainer! Please, take this!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Now it's your turn.
choice_data_list: Okay. Um... h-here, these flowers are for you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thanks! ♪
